lore.shortDescription: A falling sigil detonates in radiant fire.
lore.fullText: You mark a point you can see within range and call down a stellar sigil. Creatures in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 6d8 radiant damage and 6d8 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
lore.higherLevel: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, both damage rolls increase by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.
